topic: Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions

scenes.narration: Ek line mein bata — Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions? Galat answer = Amazon reject. Sahi answer = ₹30-55LPA.
Without understanding Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Asking the Interviewer the RIGHT Questions solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
